projects.name: Vertica Analytics Assistant
projects.tldr: NL→SQL conversion using RAG + LLM. 95% accuracy on simple queries, 70% on complex. Challenges: latency, version matching, accuracy/speed trade-offs.
projects.description: Production system that converts natural language queries into Vertica SQL using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) with vector search and LLMs. Handles metadata retrieval, prompt construction, LLM inference, and query execution.
projects.impact: Reduces query writing from 10-30 minutes to <1 second. Eliminates need to know database schema.

projects.name: CVE Automation System
projects.tldr: Automated CVE-device matching from vendor advisories. Parses → finds vulnerable devices → LLM exploitability assessment → VEX compliance → analyst overrides.
projects.description: Enterprise security system for automating vulnerability assessment. Parses CVE advisories, matches to device inventory, performs LLM-based exploitability reasoning, generates VEX compliance reports, and maintains immutable audit trails.
projects.impact: 99% reduction in manual effort. Processes 500+ CVEs/day in <5 minutes. Reduces response time from 2-4 hours to automated.

projects.name: RAG Retrieval Optimization
projects.tldr: Fixed K=5 wastes tokens on low-confidence chunks. Adaptive K strategies improve answer quality by 30% while reducing context by 25%.
projects.description: Optimization techniques for RAG systems showing why fixed top-K retrieval is suboptimal. Covers similarity decay, adaptive K strategies, and hybrid confidence+token-budget approach with empirical benchmarks.
projects.impact: Answer quality improves from 6.8/10 to 8.9/10 while reducing tokens used. Better cost-accuracy trade-offs.

projects.name: Cyber-Physical Power Grid False Data Injection Detection
projects.description: ML-based system for detecting sophisticated false data injection attacks in power grid SCADA systems using statistical anomaly detection and deep learning.
projects.impact: Achieved 95%+ detection accuracy for coordinated attacks on power grid measurements

projects.name: Medical Imaging KNN Retrieval System
projects.description: Content-based image retrieval system for medical imaging datasets using k-nearest neighbors and deep feature extraction from CNN models.
projects.impact: Enables fast similarity search across large medical image databases for research and diagnosis

projects.name: Line Outage Identification in Power Networks
projects.description: Algorithm for identifying transmission line outages in power systems using real-time measurement data and topology information.
projects.impact: Reduces outage detection time from hours to minutes in real-time grid operations

projects.name: Observability Platform for Distributed Systems
projects.description: Built comprehensive monitoring, logging, and tracing infrastructure for microservices architecture using modern observability tools.
projects.impact: Reduced MTTR by 40% through improved visibility into system health and performance
